Contracts — Digital Law

Digital Law

Legislation, regulation, and case law that shapes how technology operates.

## The Regulatory Landscape Digital regulation is accelerating. After decades of light-touch oversight, governments worldwide are enacting legislation that directly affects how technology companies operate, how data is handled, and what rights users have. --- ## Key Frameworks We Track **GDPR** — The EU's General Data Protection Regulation remains the global benchmark for data privacy law. **CCPA / CPRA** — California's privacy framework has become the de facto US standard. **Digital Services Act** — The EU's DSA imposes significant new obligations on large platforms, from content moderation to algorithmic transparency. **AI Act** — The EU's risk-based framework for artificial intelligence systems, now reshaping AI development across the industry. --- ## Our Coverage Principles We explain what the law *requires*, not just what it *says*. We track implementation and enforcement, not just passage. We link to primary sources wherever possible. ← [Back to Contracts](/contracts/)
